boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: SAR no-file closure without required approver. Boundary: case note cannot close alert without approval.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing approver and rationale remain open

critical_features_preserved: no-file rationale, alert ID, and approver match
final_answer: Source records do not authorize SAR no-file closure. The controlling control record says the required dependency is still missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped to a different action. The boundary also says the case note cannot close the alert without approval, so the correct decision is ESCALATE.
